mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, patient_id, encounter_id, history_type, template_code, content_json, source_type, recorded_by, recorded_at, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM clinical_history_entry WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinical_history_entry ( tenant_id, patient_id, encounter_id, history_type, template_code, content_json, source_type, recorded_by, recorded_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{patientId}, #{encounterId}, #{historyType}, #{templateCode}, #{contentJson, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{sourceType}, #{recordedBy}, #{recordedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE clinical_history_entry SET patient_id = #{patientId}, encounter_id = #{encounterId}, history_type = #{historyType}, template_code = #{templateCode}, content_json = #{contentJson, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, source_type = #{sourceType}, recorded_by = #{recordedBy}, recorded_at = #{recordedAt} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
